name: Mike Espy
subject: Good news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18378754/226515320/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWVjZWY4Ni0yZWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56ZplHgasdjMHupYQ2a7LlDrhDMRoygBpEfRq8fuc-Q=&emci=b0ecef86-2ecd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=b1ecef86-2ecd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
Folks, Finally, some good news just came out of Washington. **A bill to remove confederate statues from the U.S. Capitol passed the House of Representatives overwhelmingly.** Now the future of this bill is up to the Senate. Unfortunately, passing this important bill in the Senate won’t be easy. And why? Because senators like Cindy Hyde-Smith — who once claimed that the confederacy was Mississippi history “at its best” — are intent on holding us in the past. I’m especially concerned, because while this legislation is being blocked by Republican leaders in the Senate, _Hyde-Smith is in charge of the very Senate subcommittee that has the budget authority under a separate measure to remove confederate statues from the U.S. Capitol._ [**Will you rush $10 right now to my campaign to replace Cindy Hyde-Smith? This election is our chance to flip the Senate and elect leaders who will stand for progress and unity.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18378755/226515321/365558708?refcode=em-200723-statues&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWVjZWY4Ni0yZWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56ZplHgasdjMHupYQ2a7LlDrhDMRoygBpEfRq8fuc-Q=) Last month, Mississippians historically came together to retire the confederate battle emblem on the state flag after 126 years. Now the conversation is turning to what to do about confederate statues in the U.S. Capitol. _Mississippi is the only state to be represented by not one, but two confederate figures. _ I’m not afraid to be a leader on this issue. I believe that the right thing to do is replace these hurtful, hateful statues in the U.S. Capitol. If I were in the Senate right now, I would do whatever I could to replace Mississippi’s confederate statues. It’s clear that it is time to remove these old symbols of hate from the U.S. Capitol so that our country can move forward, and so that Mississippi can be represented by statues that we can all be proud of. [**If that’s the kind of leader you want representing you in the U.S. Senate, please pitch in $10 or more to our people-powered campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18378756/226515322/365558708?refcode=em-200723-statues&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWVjZWY4Ni0yZWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56ZplHgasdjMHupYQ2a7LlDrhDMRoygBpEfRq8fuc-Q=) | | [PITCH IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18378757/226515323/365558708?refcode=em-200723-statues&amount=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWVjZWY4Ni0yZWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=56ZplHgasdjMHupYQ2a7LlDrhDMRoygBpEfRq8fuc-Q=)

clean_body: | Folks, Finally, some good news just came out of Washington. A bill to remove confederate statues from the U.S. Capitol passed the House of Representatives overwhelmingly. Now the future of this bill is up to the Senate. Unfortunately, passing this important bill in the Senate won’t be easy. And why? Because senators like Cindy Hyde-Smith — who once claimed that the confederacy was Mississippi history “at its best” — are intent on holding us in the past. I’m especially concerned, because while this legislation is being blocked by Republican leaders in the Senate, Hyde-Smith is in charge of the very Senate subcommittee that has the budget authority under a separate measure to remove confederate statues from the U.S. Capitol. = Last month, Mississippians historically came together to retire the confederate battle emblem on the state flag after 126 years. Now the conversation is turning to what to do about confederate statues in the U.S. Capitol. Mississippi is the only state to be represented by not one, but two confederate figures. I’m not afraid to be a leader on this issue. I believe that the right thing to do is replace these hurtful, hateful statues in the U.S. Capitol. If I were in the Senate right now, I would do whatever I could to replace Mississippi’s confederate statues. It’s clear that it is time to remove these old symbols of hate from the U.S. Capitol so that our country can move forward, and so that Mississippi can be represented by statues that we can all be proud of. = | | = Thanks for all you do. — Mike Paid for by Mike Espy for U.S. Senate Mike Espy for U.S. Senate 4450 Old Canton Rd, Suite 205 Jackson, MS 39211 United States

name: Joseph R. Biden Jr.
subject: Peter, I'd like to give you a call soon
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
I do hope I get the chance to thank you personally. |
---
Peter -- it feels like it was just yesterday that we launched this campaign for President and the battle for the soul of the nation.

Through it all, grassroots supporters like you have kept the faith and kept this campaign running strong, sometimes even against all odds.

When we entered a general election facing a big financial deficit compared to Donald Trump, you all stepped up and have helped us get pretty darn close to closing that gap. I'm so grateful for all of you.

**Now, Sunday marks 100 days until Election Day. We're almost there, Peter, but we're going to need your help to get across the finish line and win this thing.**

So as a way to show my appreciation for the grassroots team who is making all of our hard work possible, my team is going to select a few folks who chip in through this email today to get on my next call list.

[**Peter, will you chip in $5 or anything you can spare today to go towards our 100-days-out fundraising goal? With the election quickly approaching, I'd love to give you a call and hear your thoughts »**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1__full") | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Folks like you, chipping in a few dollars at a time, have fueled our campaign since day one, Peter.

In fact, 97% of our campaign's contributions are directly from grassroots supporters like you.

It makes me so proud. _Because that's how a campaign should be run._

I wish I could personally thank each and every one of you who have funded our work to make this campaign possible. That's the truth. But, I do hope I get the chance to thank you personally, Peter.

**Chip in $5 or whatever you can today, and you may hear my appreciation directly over the phone:**

[**https://go.joebiden.com/Get-on-Joes-Call-List**](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_callfromjoe-q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1__full&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.23_B2_JRBcalls_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Thank you again. We can win this if we keep standing together.

_Joseph R. Biden Jr._

[**Click here to pause emails from the campaign for a two week period.**](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d8/1cd0ac28/172596700/357dbe17/3653502507/VEsHBg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/Take-a-Break?source=footer")

Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email, with a check, or with a spouse -- thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If we got your name or any information wrong -- we're so sorry! To update and correct your information [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d8/1cd0ac28/172596700/357dbe16/3653502507/VEsHAQ/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/s/update-your-information"). If you would like to unsubscribe, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d8/1cd0ac28/172596700/357dbe14/3653502507/VEsHAw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://go.joebiden.com/page/content/Unsubscribe").

Peter, thank you so much for supporting Joe Biden's Presidential campaign.

[ ](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d8/1cd0ac28/172596700/357dbe13/3653502507/VEsHAg/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_footer&refcode=email-bsd-20190515host-b20_FDR_states_NA-F1_S1_C1")

This isn't the time to be complacent. If you are ready to fight for the soul of this nation, you can start by donating to elect Joe Biden by clicking the button below.

But Peter, we don't want to bother you. To make a contribution by mail, [click here](https://go.joebiden.com/page/m/2931b8d8/1cd0ac28/172596700/357dbe10/3653502507/VEsEBw/?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://joebiden.com/contribute-by-mail/") for instructions.

We sincerely thank you for your help and support.
\- The entire Joe Biden for President team

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: 10 Years
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/10-years?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| |
# Enough is enough!

Across the country we’re seeing riots run rampant. Our country’s heritage is being vandalized and destroyed. Stores are being looted. The police are under attack. Crime is on the rise. Anarchy reigns and those on the left don’t want to address any of it.

We need leaders who will stand up and say enough is enough! That’s why as a senator I plan to introduce legislation to make these acts of domestic terrorism a federal crime with a mandatory 10-year prison sentence. We need to get tough on these crimes and we need laws in place that show that we mean business when we say enough is enough.

As a country we cannot sit idly by and let our heritage be destroyed, our police get attacked and anarchists who want to destroy capitalism riot daily. We need to make sure that those who seek to destroy us know that we won’t let them!

Join me in saying ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!

Dave

_P.S. – Please help me get my message out to all Kansans that enough is enough. Click on the logo below to find out how._

name: Christy Smith
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter,

I'm not usually this blunt, but I need you to know what's going on.

We started from scratch last month. What I mean by that is this: We spent every penny in our account for our special election in May -- and that means we have to build back up to take on Mike Garcia's corporate donors in November.

**Candidates in other races were able to raise and save their money through 2019 to spend it _now_ , with the general election just 103 days away. We couldn't do that.**

That means we have to campaign twice as hard with less than half the time other House campaigns have had to build their cash reserves.

**[So we need your help more than ever. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Ten Democrats you should know:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
Picture this: It's January 20, 2021. Donald Trump is on his way back to Mar-A-Lago. Joe Biden has just been sworn in as the 46th president of the United States. Democrats control the U.S. House and Se | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852500f/45c30650/1cc4d9c45/66e870bf/2427855633/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Donald Trump, his Republican enablers, and their billionaire buddies have made a mess of our country.

So now we have to clean it up. We have to fight back. And we have to elect bold new leadership this November -- up and down the ballot and across the country.

Today, I'm proud to endorse another group of inspiring Democrats who are ready to make our government work for everyone, not just a thin slice at the top:

**Local**

Monique Worrell (Orange/Osceola County State Attorney)

Kim Gardner (St. Louis City Circuit Attorney)

**State Legislature**

Aimy Steele (North Carolina's 82nd House District)

**U.S. House**

Colin Allred (Texas' 32nd District)

Jill Schupp (Missouri's 2nd District)

Beth Doglio (Washington's 10th District)

Cameron Webb (Virginia's 5th District)

Christina Hale (Indiana's 5th District)

Christina Finello (Pennsylvania's 1st District)

**U.S. Senate**

Sara Gideon (Maine)

**We can and must win big in 2020. But it's only possible if we all do our part.**

**[If making a donation would make sense for you right now, can you chip in $2 or more to help elect Warren Democrats like these in 2020? These candidates are counting on grassroots supporters like you to power their campaigns.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852500f/45c30650/1cc4d9c45/66e870a0/2427855633/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDE4Rl9BTk5fRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA3MjNfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT18F_ANN_END_E_20200723_V1S3_P")**

Picture this:

It's January 20, 2021.

Donald Trump is on his way back to Mar-A-Lago.

Joe Biden has just been sworn in as the 46th president of the United States.

Democrats control the U.S. House and Senate, have flipped state legislatures across the country, and are ready to get to work for the American people.

It's not only a pretty picture -- it's a lifeline.

Hold onto that image into your head. And keep fighting to make it real.

**This November, everything is on the line, and we all have a role to play.**

[If you can support Warren Democrats as a grassroots donor at this time, please chip in right now, and help elect these champions for working people.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852500f/45c30650/1cc4d9c45/66e870a0/2427855633/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDE4Rl9BTk5fRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA3MjNfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT18F_ANN_END_E_20200723_V1S3_P")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852500f/45c30650/1cc4d9c45/66e870a0/2427855633/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LXdkLWp1bDIwZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNVDE4Rl9BTk5fRU5EX0VfMjAyMDA3MjNfVjFTM19QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-wd-jul20fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMT18F_ANN_END_E_20200723_V1S3_P")

name: MJ Hegar
subject: Basic COVID-19 facts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Sen. Cornyn refuses to do the basic research necessary to keep our kids safe.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec1/7f51f7bc/404a04c1/4ef64751/3771682773/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter,

Sen. Cornyn's trying to reassure Texans that it's safe to send our kids back to school in the fall, but he's ignored some of the basic, publicly available facts about COVID-19, and I for one don't trust him to do what's right for my kids. **[We need to send him packing in November and make sure that we have a senator who cares about our kids.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec1/7f51f7bc/404a04c1/4ef64750/3771682773/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200723.2nd__1782__&amount=10")**

**Here 's what he said:**
* "We don't know if children can get [the virus] and transmit it to others."
* "No one under the age of 20 has died of coronavirus."

**Here are the facts:**
* **Children CAN get COVID-19,** and so can their teachers, bus drivers, other school employees, and their families.
* **Dozens of children under the age of 15 _have_ died from COVID-19.**

Maybe Sen. Cornyn would know these things if he listened to doctors and public health experts. **But instead he listens to his DC boss, Mitch McConnell,** who said that parents fear having their kids stuck at home in the fall more than they fear their kids catching COVID-19 and dying.

I'm a mom with two young kids -- their safety ALWAYS comes first, and unlike Sen. Cornyn or Mitch McConnell, you can rest assured that I'll do the research to make sure all our kids are safe.

**Will you pitch in to help me defeat Sen. Cornyn this November?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec1/7f51f7bc/404a04c1/4ef64757/3771682773/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200723.2nd__1782__&amount=5")**

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec1/7f51f7bc/404a04c1/4ef64755/3771682773/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200723.2nd__1782__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec1/7f51f7bc/404a04c1/4ef64754/3771682773/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200723.2nd__1782__&amount=50")**
**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec1/7f51f7bc/404a04c1/4ef6474b/3771682773/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200723.2nd__1782__")**
\-- MJ

**[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec1/7f51f7bc/404a04c1/4ef64750/3771682773/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE3ODIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200723.2nd__1782__&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, **[please let us know here](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ec1/7f51f7bc/404a04c1/4ef64749/3771682773/VEsHBQ/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/s/mj-covid-fewer-emails")**. We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time.

I'm a mom with two young kids -- their safety ALWAYS comes first, and unlike Sen. Cornyn or Mitch McConnell, you can rest assured that I'll do the research to make sure all our kids are safe. Will you pitch in to help me defeat Sen. Cornyn this November? | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: "" "" "" "" "" \-- MJ "" | | It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. "" However, we know this is not an easy time for many. If you'd like to pause receiving fundraising emails for the next few weeks, "". We'll still keep in touch with important information and to ask your thoughts from time to time. MJ Hegar was a member of the US Air Force and the Air National Guard. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Major Conservative Endorsement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
American Conservative Union and Kansas native Matt Schlapp have endorsed our campaign for Congress. | |
---
| | | Friend,

It has been another incredible day for our campaign. I am [humbled to announce](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8b99fb7254&e=1050d051da) that the **_American Conservative Union and Kansas native Matt Schlapp have endorsed our campaign for Congress._**

I am grateful that an organization that represents so many Americans who are fighting on behalf of our conservative values has endorsed my candidacy. I have always been a fierce advocate for the protection of American's individual liberties and will continue fighting in Washington, D.C. for the conservative principles that have made our country what it is today.

[Would you consider donating to help me fight for our conservative Kansas values in Washington D.C.?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=2b12285633&e=1050d051da)
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=995fa12dc7&e=1050d051da)
---
| Here is some of what ACU Chairman Matt Schlapp had to say:
---
| | _“Jake LaTurner is the right choice to represent the people of Kansas’s 2nd district in the United States Congress. As Treasurer of the State of Kansas, Jake has led by example and understands the importance of working toward conservative solutions that benefit all Kansans. Throughout his tenure, Jake has been a responsible and consistent steward of the taxes paid by hard-working families and individuals, and has returned millions of dollars to them in unclaimed property. Additionally, Jake’s Pro-Life values, support for the 2nd amendment, and experience in reducing government waste and redundancies means he has the values that reflect the people he seeks to represent. ACU is proud to give him our endorsement and we urge 2nd Congressional District voters to pull the lever for Jake LaTurner.”_ **_- Kansas Native Matt Schlapp_**
---
| There are only 12 days until the primary election where voters will decide which Republican they want challenging a very formidable, well-funded Democrat. We must elect a Republican who can win, and I am the candidate who can do it.

[You can help support our campaign for Congress by donating at this link.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f84cbf4d44&e=1050d051da)

Yours in the fight,

Jake LaTurner
---
| [Donate to Support a Trusted Conservative](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=1ea52ea7b3&e=1050d051da "Donate to Support a Trusted Conservative")

name: Team Joe
subject: Have you met Joe and Jill's dogs? Here they are!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
Have you met Champ and Major? |
---
Peter, in a minute, we're going to ask you to donate to Joe Biden's campaign. But first, we have to ask you a question. Have you met Champ and Major?

Champ is Vice President and Dr. Biden's older pup, who they adopted just after Obama and Biden's election victory in 2008! We think he's grown up to be pretty doggone great: | | [](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.20_B1_pups_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopen_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.20_B1_pups_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

Major is their younger rescue dog, and we couldn't leave him out, either!
[](https://go.joebiden.?g=m9NVbVNw52hcv-nFCZYEQPA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biden2020_fr_q32020?refcode=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.20_B1_pups_X__F1_S1_C1__nonopen_RS&amount=50&amounts=25,50,100,250&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&addr1=%0A&utm_medium=email&utm_source=bsd&utm_campaign=JB_EM_FR_2020.07.20_B1_pups_X__F1_S1_C1__full")

They're both loving spending so much quality time with Joe and Jill right now, but we think Champ will enjoy giving Major a tour of the White House even more.

**So, Peter, that 's where you come in. Will you help us get them there? If you can make your first $5 donation, it will go a long way toward getting decency, and dogs, back in the White House.**

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: LIVE at 5 p.m. ET: President Trump holds press briefing
body:
First Lady Melania Trump was briefed this morning by the Task Force on Protecting Native American Children in the Indian Health System. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2c18d4599f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • July 23, 2020
---
| | |
# **LIVE: President Trump holds press briefing **

🎬 [**Click here** to watch President Trump’s briefing at 5 p.m. ET.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=794f227f31&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **WATCH: First Lady Melania Trump on protecting Native American children**

**First Lady Melania Trump** was briefed this morning by the Task Force on Protecting Native American Children in the Indian Health System (IHS), which was created by President Trump last March.

**“One of the pillars** of my ‘Be Best’ initiative is children’s well-being,” the First Lady said. “And when I look around this room, I see so many people who have made the well-being of children their life’s work.”

**President Trump** formed the Task Force in response to systemic breakdowns within IHS, including one that failed to stop a predatory pediatrician from abusing his capacity as a doctor. The pediatrician left the agency in 2016 and is now in Federal prison.

**The Task Force** is developing recommended policies and best practices to protect Native American children and prevent such an abuse from ever happening again.

🎬 [**First Lady: Native American children deserve a safe environment**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=87124dd0f7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **‘We have made it our top priority to shelter our seniors’**

**The Trump Administration** is equipping states to protect our most vulnerable population—seniors—from the effects of Coronavirus. For starters, an additional $5 billion will be allocated to nursing homes that receive funds from Medicare or Medicaid.

🎬 [**Our strategy is to shelter the highest-risk Americans**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac95ec447a&e=3ee4985eea)

**Nursing homes in states** with elevated COVID-positive rates will be required to test their entire staffs each week. The Administration will help nursing homes comply by distributing 15,000 rapid point-of-care diagnostic devices and associated tests.

**“Over the past few months** , we’ve created a surveillance system to detect outbreaks, and currently 99 percent of all nursing homes are reporting directly to it. So we have great data,” President Trump said.

**A safe, strong reopening** requires continuing to protect older Americans, who are at an increased risk of suffering complications from Coronavirus. Data suggests that nearly half of all COVID-19 related deaths have occurred among residents of nursing homes and long-term care facilities. Slowing the virus’ spread among this population is essential.

**Throughout the pandemic,** the Trump Administration has taken strong action to support nursing home residents and staff. That effort includes distributing more than 66 million gloves, 14 million masks, and 13 million gowns to over 15,000 facilities nationwide.

[**President Trump: Our top priority is to shelter our seniors**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5da0332cb6&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:**[**How President Trump is protecting vulnerable seniors**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d81fa4ef9&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

---
|
---
| **President Trump delivers remarks and takes questions from the press during a briefing** | July 22, 2020
---
|

name: Mike Espy
subject: Tell Congress: Honor John Lewis by passing the Voting Rights Advancement Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Espy for U
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18380759/226574040/1543981737?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDk5MjRlZC00OWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdvDBM8BkRaFRPtgO224LCfxmCNcO8MXxib-RwYW3jQ=&emci=5f9924ed-49cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=609924ed-49cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
The _Voting Rights Act_ of 1965 was hard won by civil rights activists, like our hero Congressman John Lewis, who put their lives on the line to eradicate racial discrimination at the ballot box across the country. But six years ago, a Supreme Court decision dismantled a huge part of the _Voting Rights Act_ and stripped it of its effectiveness. Since then, we’ve seen increased rampant voter suppression take the form of voter ID laws, purged voter registration rolls, closed polling places, and more – especially in communities of color and states like Mississippi. That’s why Democrats introduced a bill last year that would renew and expand the _Voting Rights Act_ to actively prevent this kind of voter suppression. **Congress must restore the protections of the _Voting Rights Act_ — by passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ — because it is the right thing for all Americans. ** Unfortunately, though this legislation passed in the House, it’s since been stalled in the Senate, where Majority Leader Mitch McConnell has refused to bring it up for a vote. [**If you believe the Senate must take up a vote and pass the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ ASAP, add your name alongside mine now.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18380760/226574041/-1423119889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDk5MjRlZC00OWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdvDBM8BkRaFRPtgO224LCfxmCNcO8MXxib-RwYW3jQ=&emci=5f9924ed-49cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=609924ed-49cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611) | | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/18380761/226574042/-1423119889?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDk5MjRlZC00OWNkLWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YdvDBM8BkRaFRPtgO224LCfxmCNcO8MXxib-RwYW3jQ=&emci=5f9924ed-49cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=609924ed-49cd-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&ceid=11809611)
---
In light of the recent passing of my friend and civil rights icon, John Lewis, there’s no better way to honor his legacy and lifelong fight for voting rights than by passing the _John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act_ ahead of this year’s critical election.
Voting is the beating heart of our democracy, and we must ensure that everyone is heard at the ballot box.
Thank you for speaking up.
— Mike

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Don't Miss Our First Drive Through Yard Sign Pickup!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

This Saturday we're hosting our first _Drive Through Yard Sign Pickup_. Be sure to stop by the office on Saturday from 10:00am-12:00pm to say hello to Wesley and pick up your Wesley Hunt Yard Sign! Putting a sign up in your yard is a fantastic way to spread the word and let your neighbors know that you're on Team Hunt.
> > **_Where_** : Team Hunt Headquarters
> 11511 Katy Freeway
> Houston, TX 77079
>
> **_When_** : Saturday, July 25th
> 10:00am - 12:00pm
If you can't make it to the office this Saturday, please send over your address and someone from Team Hunt would be happy to drop off a yard sign at your house as soon as possible.

_Pick up your sign and join Team Hunt!_
If you have any questions, please don't hesitate to reach out. We hope to see you on Saturday!

Sincerely,
Team Hunt

name: Sean McElwee, Data for Progress
subject: 📊NEW presidential poll alert 📊
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Here's how Biden can unite even more Democrats.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=2&akid=1616%2E53494%2E9oGns0) Friend, Months ago, Data for Progress polling found that a whopping 75% of Democrats would be more likely to vote for Joe Biden in November if he makes an even stronger commitment to the climate. Since then, Biden has released new climate policy plans that include many of the proposals that activists and policymakers -- including our friends at Evergreen Action -- have been pushing for. **And according to brand new polling from July, it's paying off: Biden's support for ambitious clean energy projects and environmental justice could help him win votes in 12 battleground states we surveyed, including Wisconsin, Florida, and Arizona.** [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/648?t=3&akid=1616%2E53494%2E9oGns0) With enthusiasm for these climate policies growing around the country, they should receive top billing at next month's convention and beyond. **[As Biden prepares to accept the Democratic nomination for president, let's make sure he knows where we stand: Sign our petition to urge Biden to run for president on a vision of an environmentally just, 100% clean energy economy.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/648?t=4&akid=1616%2E53494%2E9oGns0)** | [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/648?t=5&akid=1616%2E53494%2E9oGns0)
---
Thanks to public pressure, Biden now has the most ambitious climate plans of any presidential nominee in history, and polling shows that making those plans a priority could turn the political tide even more in his favor.
That's why we're calling on him to give these plans top billing at the Democratic National Convention next month, in his campaign through Election Day, and, if he wins, on Day One of his presidency.
We applaud Vice President Biden for his commitment -- now, we ask him to turn that commitment into a reality.
**[Add your name today to urge Joe Biden to campaign on a vision of an environmentally just, 100% clean energy economy and -- if he wins -- to make it a priority on Day One of his presidency.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/648?t=6&akid=1616%2E53494%2E9oGns0)**
Activists, politicians, and voters are converging in the realization that, regardless of our political stripe or where we come from, we all have a shared interest in solving the climate crisis.
Even I don't need data to tell me that's a pretty powerful idea to campaign on.
Thanks,
Sean McElwee
Co-Founder, Data for Progress
[ADD YOUR NAME ](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/648?t=7&akid=1616%2E53494%2E9oGns0)
---

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani=20Brzozowski?=
subject: Lauren Underwood, Robin Kelly, and Marie Newman invite you!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dani for Illinois
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/93e8db1f987f/lauren-underwood-robin-kelly-and-marie-newman-invite-you?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | On July 28th, I'll be joined by Congresswomen Lauren Underwood and Robin Kelly, and future Congresswoman Marie Newman for a virtual fundraiser, and you won't want to miss it!

All 3 of these women are such an inspiration to me, and **I am honored to have their support.** Our districts all border each other, and I can't wait to get to Congress with them so that we can work together to fight for the people of northern Illinois.

**[Click here to get your tickets and join us on the 28th!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=dca7fd6ffb&e=140a9b81e7)**

One of the things that Lauren, Robin, and Marie all have in common is that **they have faced tough races and proved their doubters wrong, which is exactly what we're going to do in IL-16 this year.** When I got in this race, so many people were skeptical of our chances to win, but that's not the case anymore. We've got momentum, in large part because leaders like Reps Underwood and Kelly have been such big supporters of our cause.

With these inspirational women by my side, along with all of you, **I know we can win this race. **

**So join us on the 28th, and learn all about our plans to stand together and fight for our shared progressive values when we head to Congress together in January of 2021.** I hope to see you there!

Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

name: Gina Raimondo
body:
Your RI COVID-19 News Update
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
I'm writing to you today with sad news. As of today, we have lost over 1,000 Rhode Islanders to COVID-19.
It's difficult to put into words how terrible that loss is; how painful it is for their loved ones. My heart breaks for the thousands of Rhode Islanders who have lost someone to this virus. These beloved members of our community will be deeply missed.
We must continue to do everything we can in their memory to protect our neighbors, friends, and family from COVID-19. My thoughts, today and every day, are with the loved ones of those we have lost.
Beginning tonight, I am illuminating the State House dome in red, white, and blue as a symbol of statewide solidarity and sympathy. I hope those who are struggling with loss are able to look at the State House and know that the whole of Rhode Island is with them.
Please, take care of yourself, your family, your friends, and your neighbors. In times like these, we belong to each other.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
---

name: Team Mackler
subject: Special Interest Smackdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James Mackler for U
body:
Tennessee Edition
|
---
[ ](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c7/18d6a294/4c8f26ba/26d7e819/3753311568/VEsH/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://www.jamesmackler.com/")

| | Folks: "Washington insiders are picking their fighters" Past and present presidential hopefuls are now descending on Tennessee to influence the outcome of our election for our open U.S. Senate seat. Extremists like Rand Paul, Tom Cotton, and Ted Cruz are all making their choices known -- and none of 'em will be what's best for Tennesseans. | [](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c7/18d6a294/4c8f26ba/26d7e806/3753311568/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200723?refcode=jme200723_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Listen -- we can't send another rubber stamp for an agenda that's hurting Tennessee to the Senate. We already have one with Marsha Blackburn, and one is bad enough.
Combat veteran James Mackler is asking us to let him serve again, in the U.S. Senate, in this new crisis. We desperately need someone more focused on serving people than pleasing ambitious extremists and all the special interests bankrolling them.
James is running because all these insiders insidering is exactly what's wrong with Washington -- it's why things aren't getting any better in Tennessee. James is running to restore respect, honesty, and integrity in Washington. He'll do what's right and stand up to any party leader when they're wrong.
[_**Help James serve again. Chip in $6 right now -- a dollar for each endorsement.**_](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c7/18d6a294/4c8f26ba/26d7e806/3753311568/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200723?refcode=jme200723_m_other&refcode2=107423")
| | [Fight back ->](https://secure.jamesmackler.com/page/m/364aa0c7/18d6a294/4c8f26ba/26d7e806/3753311568/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxMDc0MjMiLCJlM3R6YkhWbmZYMD0iOiJqbWUyMDA3MjMiLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/?g=HpMoNK0LBwxckIwjLS9nKqA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jme200723?refcode=jme200723_m_other&refcode2=107423")
---
Thanks,
Team Mackler

|

body:
| Derek- Yesterday, I shared with you that we challenged my primary opponent to a series of debates. After all, Granite Staters deserve to know what their elected officials stand for. Well, **despite sending this request to Matt Mowers’ address in New York City, his million-dollar condo in Washington, DC, and his rental apartment in NH, his response to WMUR was...** ****Wait for it...**
"We didn't get it."** ****Now that he knows,**he STILL won't agree to a debate**. It's not just disappointing, it's _offensive_. _[_Will you help me force Mowers into a debate (or 7)?_](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDcxOTQ3MTE1NzU5NDA4NjQ0JmM9bThoMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzU3MTIyNjcmZD1rOXQweDVv.oi0r5eArv0BqnD7q-f1h787JjQFZlL82K_8WNXZM2Oo)_ This election should be decided by the voters of New Hampshire’s First Congressional District – not by Washington, D.C. insiders and special interest money. We're putting together an ad to make sure that voters know that Mowers is too afraid to have a debate on New Hampshire's and America's challenges, but we need to raise at least $2500 to make it. _**[>> Chip in $25 today and force Mowers to respond](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDcxOTQ3MTE1NzU5NDA4NjQ0JmM9bThoMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzU3MTIyNzMmZD1tNGY2ZDJt.36es4WEsrRr0uiKE2yPHs3v3eDVwMB6_AW5PE_rT7ik)**_ _****_If we get 100 people to donate that, then we're set! Remember: Mowers was sent to New Hampshire from New Jersey to run here with big, swampy donors who hope you don’t ask too many questions about his past or how long he’s lived in the Granite State. I’ve lived here my entire adult life and share our Granite State values. We HAVE to put pressure on Mowers to have a debate. We HAVE to make a stand on this issue, and we need your help to do it. [_Will you help me out today?_](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDcxOTQ3MTE1NzU5NDA4NjQ0JmM9bThoMSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNzU3MTIyNzYmZD12M3kxcjRq.-i83a0ONUKa8iV6W3m8EeJvG0-2XF4IurxdVwOWKGew)__ Thank you,
-Matt Mayberry
Candidate for US Congress[ _
